resources.string: Start a capture session, open the camera, and begin collecting frames for the plate pipeline.
This first version only opens the camera preview and runs a frame analyzer. Next we can add best-shot selection, quality scoring, plate tracking, and OCR.
Opening camera stream and ALPR debug pipeline\u2026
Point the rear camera at a plate. This screen is already wired for live frame analysis; plate detection and OCR can be added on top of this pipeline.
Overlay colors: yellow = static scene candidate, cyan = filtered plate-like region, green = tracked region accepted for OCR. The top-right card shows the latest saved crop and its OCR text.
Camera permission is required to run a live ALPR session.
